A social platform built for fashion lovers. Post outfits, join styling prompts, and find looks by aesthetic.

LiteLog - Digital Attendance Control
React Native / Full-stack Developer, DE, 12 months, team size 3-4
https://litelog.de/en
Digital attendance control system with offline-first mobile functionality, NFC scanning, geofencing, push notifications, and real-time updates using Socket.IO.
Stack: React Native, React, Node.js, SQLite, PostgreSQL, Socket.IO, Firebase, Mapbox, Leaflet, TerraDraw
Responsibilities:
- Built mobile and web UI with React Native and React
- Implemented backend APIs with Node.js/Express and PostgreSQL
- Integrated real-time features using Socket.IO
- Worked with offline-first mobile solutions and local SQLite storage
- Implemented NFC scanning, geofencing, and push notifications
- Maintained and improved legacy codebases, ensuring stability and scalability
